verses.text: When a leper is healed, the priest goes out to him. Healed. Cleansing begins outside the camp.
When a leper is healed, the priest goes out to him. Healed. Cleansing begins outside the camp.
When a leper is healed, the priest goes out to him. Healed. Cleansing begins outside the camp.
Two birds: one killed, the other dipped in its blood and let loose. Two birds. One dies, one goes free — a picture of redemption.
Two birds: one killed, the other dipped in its blood and let loose. Two birds. One dies, one goes free — a picture of redemption.
Two birds: one killed, the other dipped in its blood and let loose. Two birds. One dies, one goes free — a picture of redemption.
Two birds: one killed, the other dipped in its blood and let loose. Two birds. One dies, one goes free — a picture of redemption.
He washes, shaves, and waits seven days. Washed. Cleansing takes time.
He washes, shaves, and waits seven days. Washed. Cleansing takes time.
On the eighth day he brings trespass, sin, and burnt offerings. Offerings. Blood completes the cleansing.
On the eighth day he brings trespass, sin, and burnt offerings. Offerings. Blood completes the cleansing.
On the eighth day he brings trespass, sin, and burnt offerings. Offerings. Blood completes the cleansing.
On the eighth day he brings trespass, sin, and burnt offerings. Offerings. Blood completes the cleansing.
The blood and oil are put on his ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is reclaimed for God.
The blood and oil are put on his ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is reclaimed for God.
The blood and oil are put on his ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is reclaimed for God.
The blood and oil are put on his ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is reclaimed for God.
The blood and oil are put on his ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is reclaimed for God.
The priest makes atonement, and he is clean. Clean. Atonement restores him to the camp.
The priest makes atonement, and he is clean. Clean. Atonement restores him to the camp.
If poor, he may bring less. The poor. God eases the burden for the needy.
If poor, he may bring less. The poor. God eases the burden for the needy.
If poor, he may bring less. The poor. God eases the burden for the needy.
His offerings are waved; oil is poured into the priest's hand. Waved. The gift is presented.
His offerings are waved; oil is poured into the priest's hand. Waved. The gift is presented.
His offerings are waved; oil is poured into the priest's hand. Waved. The gift is presented.
The blood and oil are applied to ear, hand, and toe. Applied. The same grace reaches the poor.
The blood and oil are applied to ear, hand, and toe. Applied. The same grace reaches the poor.
The blood and oil are applied to ear, hand, and toe. Applied. The same grace reaches the poor.
He offers what he can; the priest atones. Atoned. God accepts the humble gift.
He offers what he can; the priest atones. Atoned. God accepts the humble gift.
He offers what he can; the priest atones. Atoned. God accepts the humble gift.
A plague in a house is shown to the priest. In a house. Even dwellings can be defiled.
A plague in a house is shown to the priest. In a house. Even dwellings can be defiled.
A plague in a house is shown to the priest. In a house. Even dwellings can be defiled.
A plague in a house is shown to the priest. In a house. Even dwellings can be defiled.
A plague in a house is shown to the priest. In a house. Even dwellings can be defiled.
The house is shut up; infected stones are removed. Removed. The defilement is cut out.
The house is shut up; infected stones are removed. Removed. The defilement is cut out.
The house is shut up; infected stones are removed. Removed. The defilement is cut out.
The house is shut up; infected stones are removed. Removed. The defilement is cut out.
The house is shut up; infected stones are removed. Removed. The defilement is cut out.
If it returns, the house is broken down. Broken down. Stubborn defilement is destroyed.
If it returns, the house is broken down. Broken down. Stubborn defilement is destroyed.
If it returns, the house is broken down. Broken down. Stubborn defilement is destroyed.
If it returns, the house is broken down. Broken down. Stubborn defilement is destroyed.
If it returns, the house is broken down. Broken down. Stubborn defilement is destroyed.
If the plague spreads not, the house is cleansed with birds. Cleansed. The dwelling is made fit.
If the plague spreads not, the house is cleansed with birds. Cleansed. The dwelling is made fit.
If the plague spreads not, the house is cleansed with birds. Cleansed. The dwelling is made fit.
Blood and the living bird cleanse and atone for the house. Atoned. The home is restored to use.
Blood and the living bird cleanse and atone for the house. Atoned. The home is restored to use.
Blood and the living bird cleanse and atone for the house. Atoned. The home is restored to use.
This is the law of leprosy, to teach when it is clean or unclean. The law. God's order discerns clean and unclean.
